title: pyrus vertesensis
side_effects: Pyrus vertesensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in some individuals. Consuming large quantities of its extract can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, using the plant's compounds without proper guidance can cause allergic reactions, including itching, hives, and swelling. Furthermore, improper use may also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
